title: agent-bober CLI fully broken — circular-import TDZ at module load
scope: global — every agent-bober command aborts at CLI import time
rootCause: Order-dependent circular-import temporal-dead-zone: critic-deep.ts read DEEP_MAX_TOTAL_CALLS/DEEP_EXPAND_MAX_RETRIES at module-evaluation time, imported from decomposer-deep.ts which imports runCritiqueLoop back from critic-deep.ts. Loading decomposer-deep first (via src/fleet/index.ts:27) left those bindings in their TDZ.
whyMissed: Unit tests import the modules in the safe order so the suite was green; the real Node ESM CLI loads the unsafe order. Passes-tests / breaks-binary.
fix: New dependency-free leaf src/fleet/decomposer-deep-constants.ts holds the init-time constants; decomposer-deep re-exports them; critic-deep imports the init-time ones from the leaf. + regression test src/fleet/decomposer-deep-load-order.test.ts.
verification: tsc clean; both module load orders OK; CLI boots (--version 0.17.1, --help 0 TDZ lines); full suite 2797 passed / 3 skipped / 0 failed.
